# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js Express application. Use the official Node.js base image and install dependencies with npm install. The app listens on port 3000. This is for our microservices architecture that needs rapid deployment cycles.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:alpine

# Create and change to the app directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install --only=production

# Copy the rest of the application code
COPY . .

# Set the NODE_ENV environment variable
ENV NODE_ENV=production

# Expose the application port
EXPOSE 3000

# Use a non-root user for security
RUN addgroup -S appgroup && adduser -S appuser -G appgroup
USER appuser

# Start the application
CMD ["node", "app.js"]
